quote.text: I've failed over and over and over again in my life. And that is why I succeed.
quote.author: Michael Jordan

micro_action.task: Drink 2 liters of water today.

quote.text: I can accept failure. Everyone fails at something. But I can't accept not trying.
quote.author: Michael Jordan

micro_action.task: Eat 2 pieces of fruit today.

quote.text: What I'm doing right now, I'm chasing perfection.
quote.author: Kobe Bryant
quote.attribution: The Mamba Mentality: How I Play (2018)

micro_action.task: Say 'thank you' to your coach after practice.

quote.text: Talent wins games, but teamwork and intelligence wins championships.
quote.author: Michael Jordan

micro_action.task: High-five every teammate today.

quote.text: Be authentic, and let them like you or not for who you actually are.
quote.author: Kobe Bryant
quote.attribution: The Mamba Mentality: How I Play (2018)

micro_action.task: Share one thing you're proud of with a parent.

quote.text: Get over yourself! 'Cause it's not about you, man. You are not that important!
quote.author: Kobe Bryant

micro_action.task: Help clean up equipment after your session.

quote.text: I set another goal … a reasonable, manageable goal that I could realistically achieve if I worked hard enough. I approached everything step by step.
quote.author: Michael Jordan

micro_action.task: Write down your goal for this week.

quote.text: Limits, like fears, are often just an illusion.
quote.author: Michael Jordan

micro_action.task: Try one new skill or drill you find difficult today.

quote.text: I really think a champion is defined not by their wins but by how they can recover when they fall.
quote.author: Serena Williams

micro_action.task: Drink a glass of water first thing in the morning.

quote.text: The only place success comes before work is in the dictionary.
quote.author: Vince Lombardi

micro_action.task: Pack your sports bag the night before.

quote.text: One important key to success is self-confidence. An important key to self-confidence is preparation.
quote.author: Arthur Ashe

micro_action.task: Stretch for 10 minutes before bed.

quote.text: Excellence is the gradual result of always striving to do better.
quote.author: Pat Riley

micro_action.task: Eat a healthy snack instead of chips or sweets today.

quote.text: I hated every minute of training, but I said, 'Don't quit. Suffer now and live the rest of your life as a champion.'
quote.author: Muhammad Ali

micro_action.task: Do 5 extra push-ups or sit-ups.

quote.text: If you are afraid of failure you don't deserve to be successful!
quote.author: Charles Barkley

micro_action.task: Cheer for a teammate when they make a mistake.

quote.text: No matter how good you get, you can always get better, and that's the exciting part.
quote.author: Tiger Woods

micro_action.task: Ask your coach for one thing you can improve.

quote.text: Champions keep playing until they get it right.
quote.author: Billie Jean King

micro_action.task: Practice your 'weak' side (left hand/foot) for 5 minutes.

quote.text: The backbone of success is hard work, determination, good planning, and the perseverance to see it through.
quote.author: Mia Hamm

micro_action.task: Drink water instead of a sugary drink at lunch.

quote.text: I'm a very positive thinker, and I think that is what helps me the most in difficult moments.
quote.author: Roger Federer

micro_action.task: Hold the door open for someone today.

quote.text: A life is not important except in the impact it has on other lives.
quote.author: Jackie Robinson

micro_action.task: Give a compliment to someone at school.

quote.text: I don't think limits.
quote.author: Usain Bolt

micro_action.task: Focus on beating your own best time or score today.

quote.text: For me, losing is not coming second. It’s coming out of a swim and knowing that you could have done better.
quote.author: Ian Thorpe

micro_action.task: Carry a water bottle with you all day.

quote.text: I was never coached; I just played the game.
quote.author: Don Bradman

micro_action.task: Shake hands with your opponent after the match.

quote.text: You got to believe in yourself.
quote.author: Cathy Freeman

micro_action.task: Have a piece of fruit as your afternoon snack.

quote.text: I’m just a girl from Brisbane who happens to play tennis.
quote.author: Ash Barty

micro_action.task: Reflect on one thing you did well today.

quote.text: I don’t really care what people think of me, as long as I’m happy.
quote.author: Sam Kerr

micro_action.task: Smile when things get tough in training.

quote.text: It’s about making the most of every opportunity.
quote.author: Ellyse Perry

micro_action.task: Say 'Please' and 'Thank you' to your parents/guardians today.

quote.text: There may be people who have more talent than you, but there’s no excuse for anyone to work harder than you do.
quote.author: Derek Jeter

micro_action.task: Help a younger player with their skills.

quote.text: I’d rather regret the risks that didn’t work out than the chances I didn’t take at all.
quote.author: Simone Biles

micro_action.task: Drink a glass of water before every meal.

quote.text: I didn’t come this far to only come this far.
quote.author: Tom Brady

micro_action.task: Set a Personal Best in one exercise today.

quote.text: It isn't the mountains ahead to climb that wear you out; it's the pebble in your shoe.
quote.author: Muhammad Ali

micro_action.task: Clean your sports shoes or equipment today.
